docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED AUG-24-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GAVIN, ROBERT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-25-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-25-2021 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF VIRGIL JOHNSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROBERT GAVIN IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMM PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-25-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, VIRGIL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GAVIN, ROBERT $496.80 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $566.80, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $248.40 AND THE COURT AWARDS AN ADDITIONAL $248.40 AS PLAINTIFF PRESENTED EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT ACTED FRAUDULENTLY, INTENTIONALLY AND MALICIOUSLY WHEN HE MADE UNAUTHORIZED CHARGES TO THE PLAINTIFF'S BANK ACCOUNT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $248.40 FILED BY JOHNSON, VIRGIL AS TO DEFENDANT GAVIN, ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
